methodology.phase_1: Fetched all 460 published posts with metadata (title, categories, content)
methodology.phase_2: Built internal link graph - scanned all post content for <a> tags pointing to other posts
methodology.phase_4: For each orphan, found same-category posts and injected contextual internal links
methodology.linking_strategy: Category-based relevance matching with 2 links per orphan post

impact.authority_flow: 200 new internal links now distribute PageRank to formerly isolated content
impact.crawl_depth: 105 posts moved from orphan status to linked content graph
impact.indexation: Improved crawl path for Googlebot to discover and index 22.8% of total content
impact.user_experience: Readers can now navigate between related posts in same categories

remaining_work.3_orphans: Posts 19045, 19035, 10028 had no same-category candidates for linking
remaining_work.recommendation: Manually review these 3 posts and add contextual links from related content
